title: Multiple failed logins to a team member's account
excerpt:
Every day I’m getting three or four of these emails titled “Multiple failed logins to a team member’s account”. 
How can I turn these off? They offer no value to me.

posts.author: grt-s (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Every day I’m getting three or four of these emails titled “Multiple failed logins to a team member’s account”.

How can I turn these off? They offer no value to me.
